# BOA — Backend on AWS, without the complexity

> A complete backend on AWS in under a minute. Built for agents. Free until your users show up. No ceiling when they do.

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](guides/getting-started.md): Prerequisites, installation, first backend in 10 minutes
- [How It Works](guides/how-it-works.md): Architecture overview, the opinionated stack, what happens when you build
- [FAQ](guides/faq.md): Pricing, comparisons, common questions

## Database (Aurora DSQL)

- [Database Overview](guides/database/overview.md): Serverless PostgreSQL, DSQL vs standard Postgres, supported features
- [Tables and Data](guides/database/tables.md): Creating tables, data types, schema patterns by app type
- [Migrations](guides/database/migrations.md): File-based schema management, naming, content rules, runner
- [Connecting](guides/database/connecting.md): IAM auth from Lambda, psql, environment variables
- [Querying](guides/database/querying.md): CRUD, pagination, full-text search, aggregation

## Auth (Amazon Cognito)

- [Auth Overview](guides/auth/overview.md): Cognito setup, Supabase-JS compatibility, accessing users in Lambda
- [Email & Password](guides/auth/email-password.md): Sign-up, sign-in, password reset, auto-confirm
- [Social Login](guides/auth/social-login.md): Google, Apple, and other identity providers
- [JWTs](guides/auth/jwts.md): Token lifecycle, refresh, roles (anon, authenticated, service_role)
- [MFA](guides/auth/mfa.md): TOTP setup with Google Authenticator / Authy

## API (API Gateway + pgrest-lambda)

- [API Overview](guides/api/overview.md): REST endpoints, auto-generated CRUD, API keys
- [REST Endpoints](guides/api/rest.md): Filtering, sorting, pagination, error handling
- [Authorization](guides/api/authorization.md): BOA authorizer, roles, access policies, CORS

## Storage (Amazon S3)

- [Storage Overview](guides/storage/overview.md): Presigned URLs, upload/download flow, file organization

## Functions (AWS Lambda)

- [Functions Overview](guides/functions/overview.md): API functions, webhooks, scheduled jobs, environment variables

## Deployment (SAM / CloudFormation)

- [Deployment Overview](guides/deployment/overview.md): SAM template, environments, Amplify hosting, teardown
